distilleries.name: Distillerie Lehmann
distilleries.description: Lehmann family in Obernai since 1850, classic Alsace eaux-de-vie, fruit liqueurs and the Elsass Whisky range from copper-pot distillation of regional fruit and grain.
distilleries.distillation_method: Copper pot-still distillation of fermented Alsace fruit; barrel ageing for whisky
distilleries.tasting_program: Guided distillery tour with tasting flight; reservations recommended

distilleries.name: Distillerie Jean-Paul Mette
distilleries.description: Founded 1960 by Jean-Paul Mette, passed to Philippe Traber 1997. Ribeauville cellar producing more than 120 eaux-de-vie and liqueurs from single-fruit fermentation and pot distillation.
distilleries.distillation_method: Single-fruit fermentation followed by small-batch pot-still distillation
distilleries.tasting_program: Boutique tasting and small-batch distillery visit by appointment

distilleries.name: Distillerie Hepp
distilleries.address: 94 Rue de la Walck, 67350 Uberach, France
distilleries.description: Hepp family in Uberach since 1972, first Alsace whisky released 2007, copper-pot distillation of grain whisky and Vosges-fruit eaux-de-vie alongside a gin range.
distilleries.distillation_method: Copper pot-still distillation of fermented grain and fruit; cask-ageing for whisky
distilleries.tasting_program: Guided distillery tour with tasting; chais visit by reservation

distilleries.name: Distillerie Massenez
distilleries.address: 1 Zone Industrielle du Haechy, 68220 Dieffenbach-au-Val, France
distilleries.description: Five generations of Massenez in Dieffenbach-au-Val, founded 1870. Eaux-de-vie and cremes from local fruit with the Miss Massenez boutique on site for tasting.
distilleries.distillation_method: Traditional copper still distillation of single-fruit ferments
distilleries.tasting_program: Boutique Miss Massenez tasting Monday to Friday

distilleries.name: Distillerie G. Miclo
distilleries.description: Founded 1962 by Gilbert Miclo at the foot of the Vosges in Lapoutroie, multi-still cellar producing eaux-de-vie, Welche's whisky, gin and the full Alsace fruit-creme range.
distilleries.distillation_method: Multiple copper pot stills for single-fruit eaux-de-vie; column-still for grain whisky
distilleries.tasting_program: Visitor shop with free tasting; guided distillery tour by reservation

distilleries.name: Distillerie Jos Nusbaumer
distilleries.description: Founded 1947 by Joseph Nusbaumer in the Ville valley, family distillery producing single-fruit eaux-de-vie and an artisanal gin botanicalised with Vosges plants.
distilleries.distillation_method: Small-batch fruit fermentation and copper pot-still distillation in Steige
distilleries.tasting_program: Guided distillery tour with tasting; reservation required

distilleries.name: Distillerie Meyer
distilleries.description: Founded 1958 by Fridolin Meyer in Hohwarth, son Jean-Claude launched the Meyer's Alsace whisky in 2007. Highest-medal-count distillery at the Concours General Agricole de Paris.
distilleries.distillation_method: Pot-still distillation of single-fruit ferments and grain mash; cask-ageing for whisky
distilleries.tasting_program: Distillery visit with tasting; shop open weekdays

distilleries.name: Distillerie Paul Devoille Musee des Eaux de Vie
distilleries.address: 85 Rue du General Dufieux, 68650 Lapoutroie, France
distilleries.description: Musee des Eaux de Vie in an 1832 post-station building in Lapoutroie, operated by SAS Distillerie Paul Devoille. Eaux-de-vie tasting in the 30th most-visited Alsace site.
distilleries.distillation_method: Copper still distillation and oak-ageing of single-fruit eaux-de-vie
distilleries.tasting_program: Museum visit with tasting; reservations recommended in season

distilleries.name: Wolfberger Eaux-de-Vie d'Alsace
distilleries.description: Wolfberger cooperative's eaux-de-vie line distilled at the Eguisheim site, single-fruit kirsch, mirabelle and poire william plus marc de Gewurztraminer aged in cask.
distilleries.distillation_method: Copper pot-still distillation of single-fruit ferments and marc; barrel-ageing in old foudres
distilleries.tasting_program: Free walk-in tasting of eaux-de-vie alongside the wine range
